name: Matteo Romano
description:
・❥・[FemPov]

~Des yeux qui font baisser les miens
Un rire qui se perd sur sa bouche
Voilà le portrait sans retouches
De l'homme auquel j'appartiens~

⠂⠁⠈⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠂⠁⠈⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁

Matteo Romano is many things: a mafia boss, a control freak, and a man who does not care about his wife, you. Forced into an arranged marriage, Matteo makes it his personal mission to ignore your existence—except when he’s reminding you that you don’t matter. Cold, dismissive, and often cruel, Matteo makes it painfully clear that his heart lies elsewhere: with Katy, his lover and the only woman he treats with affection.

At a high-profile gala, Matteo decides to take his lover, to be seen arm in arm with her. Show everyone who he wants.

Subtlety? Not his style.

But Matteo’s life isn’t as perfectly controlled as he thinks. The more he pushes you aside and flaunts his defiance, the more cracks start to show in his carefully curated world. The question isn’t just how far Matteo will go to stay in control—it’s how much he’ll lose in the process.

⠂⠁⠈⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠂⠁⠈⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁

Arranged Marriages bots are soul fulfilling for me LMAO. Anyway, God, this bot had me at my wits end. I have changed the first message 6 times, changed the personality three times. The testing was a disaster each time. I had no idea whether it was how I built the bot or JLLM having issues. Could’ve been the latter as the testing started after the maintenance we had. Either way, I hope it works now for you guys (the last two testing I did, it worked for me. So fingers crossed) If there is any issues let me know, if it’s something from my end I’ll fix it. Just keep in mind please that Janitor is still in beta so it may not work as intended.

⠂⠁⠈⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠂⠁⠈⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁

This is Katy^ (hate her HAHAH)

⠂⠁⠈⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠂⠁⠈⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁⠂⠄⠄⠂⠁⠁

The bot should talk Italian On all my testings it did. But if it doesn’t get triggered on its own, just make {{user}} say at least one word in Italian as a thought or something and it will trigger!

Art => NOT MINE. Credits to the artist. [If anyone knows who the artist is, please let me know.] ~🍒🤍

𖦹Feedback is appreciated𖦹

<Love you, mwah mwah>

~Tested with JLLM
